title: Thanks I Have REI
description: This mod aims to remove annoying or not too useful features from the game.
body:
Supports Fabric, Quilt, Forge, NeoForge.

Removing features that might be annoying or unused in modded Minecraft.

## Removed features include:
 - **Multiplayer disclaimer**(shown when clicking the multiplayer button, see gallery)
 - **Experimental warning**(shown when creating worlds with mods/datapacks)
 - **Recipe book**(removed not just visually, but the server side logic as well)
 - ~~**Auto Jump** is now OFF by default~~(Removed in 1.5 as it is now in vanilla)
 - **Music** is now muted by default
 - **GUI scale** is 2 by default
 - **Telemetry** is disabled
 - **Outdated resource pack warning screen** is disabled(outdated packs are still red, but you don't need to confirm that you want to enable them)

If you know any other thing that should be removed, feel free to open an issue.
